title: helia pratensis
intro: Helia pratensis, also known as Helianthus pratensis, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Helia pratensis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
